summary: The user is in the process of creating a website for their newly registered digital marketing agency and is considering using Wix as their website builder. They are seeking recommendations for templates, guidance on setting up a contact form, optimizing for SEO, and integrating Google Analytics, as well as tools for creating a social media content calendar.
facts: The user has recently registered their business and opened a business bank account. The user has been in business for three months and is already landing clients. The user is considering using the Digital Agency template on Wix for their website. The user is looking for templates specifically designed for digital marketing agencies on Wix. The user is interested in optimizing their website for SEO to improve search engine rankings. The user is seeking assistance in setting up Google Analytics on their Wix website. The user is looking for tools or templates to create a social media content calendar for planning and scheduling posts.
